diagrams.title: Pass-by-Value Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how objects are duplicated when passed by value to functions
diagrams.purpose: Understand memory overhead and copy constructor invocation in pass-by-value

diagrams.title: Pass-by-Reference Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how reference alias points to same object without copying
elements: Both pointing to same memory address
diagrams.purpose: Visualize efficiency of pass-by-reference and memory sharing

diagrams.title: Object Slicing Demonstration
diagrams.description: Shows how derived class object loses its derived portion when passed by value to base class parameter
elements: Derived class object with base + derived parts
Base class portion only after slicing
diagrams.purpose: Understand when and why slicing occurs and prevention methods

diagrams.title: Memory Layout - Pass by Pointer
diagrams.description: Shows how pointer stores address and accesses object through arrow operator
diagrams.purpose: Understand pointer-based object passing and memory addressing
